failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local confirmed intraday fractal pivot transition rank over closed-bar pivot type, pivot age, distance, pivot box, alternation, breakout, reclaim, failed-break, retest, wick, path, spread, and session-position features
failure_asset.next_boundary: do not retry this intraday fractal pivot transition surface with simple score thresholds, pivot-window tweaks, stop, target, hold, activity, spread, capital, or retry nudges; next work should choose a materially new C0030 major hypothesis axis
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: proxy was negative, aggregate MT5 tick was negative, and all nine fold-isolated MT5 tick folds lost; worst fold rw_007 net PnL was -12.69 and max drawdown was 2.592 percent

supporting_lessons.summary: confirmed fractal pivot transition rank met target activity but lost all nine rolling-window OOS folds; total tick net PnL was -78.64 and worst fold rw_007 net PnL was -12.69
schedule replay logic parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so failure is hypothesis quality and execution behavior rather than a proxy-to-EA schedule mismatch
tick execution was better than closed-bar logic by 6.43 total net PnL, but all folds still lost and no candidate quality was rescued

pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: Tests confirmed intraday fractal pivot transition as a new C0029 campaign surface with mandatory schedule-replay MT5 pairing.

notes: Proxy output is reference evidence and cannot stop MT5 validation.
